companies.name: Sony Music Entertainment International Services GmbH

title: The Best Of Sade
notes:
Half-speed mastered by Miles Showell at Abbey Road.

180 Gram Vinyl

Hype sticker on front shrink: "The Best of Sade"

Tracks are numbered sequentially across sides on the release.

On spine: 88875180591 [Sony and Epic logos]

On back cover: ℗ 1994 Sony Music Entertainment UK Limited © 2016 Sony Music Entertainment UK Limited / Distributed by Sony Music Entertainment.
Made in the EU / Sony Music Entertainment International Services GmbH, PO Box 510, 33311 Gütersloh, Germany. / LC 00199 / 88875180591.

On inner sleeve: 
Tracks are listed sequential, regardless of sides 

Mastered by Ian Cooper/Metropolis Mastering, London/1994

A1 to B3 ℗ 1985
B4 to C2 ℗ 1988
C3 to D1, D3, D4 ℗ 1992
D2 ℗ 1993 Sony Music Entertainment.

A1 to A3: Recorded at The Power Plant, London / 1984
Taken from [url=https://www.discogs.com/Sade-Diamond-Life/master/43936]Diamond Life [/url]

A4 to B3: Recorded at The Power Plant, London  / Studio Miraval, France / 1985
Taken from [url=https://www.discogs.com/Sade-Promise/master/43946]Promise[/url]

B4 to C2: Recorded at Compass Point, Nassau / Studio Miraval, France / Studio Marcadet, Paris / 1987
Taken from [url=https://www.discogs.com/Sade-Stronger-Than-Pride/master/110941]Stronger Than Pride [/url]

C3 to D1, D3, D4: Recorded at Studio Condulmer, Venice / Ridge Farm, Surrey / The Hit Factory, London / 1992
Taken from [url=https://www.discogs.com/Sade-Love-Deluxe/master/110938]Love Deluxe[/url]

D2: Recorded at Conway Studios and Ameraycan Studios, Los Angeles / 1993

Runouts are etched, except 14901 1X 88875180591 stamped

Compared to [r=8131475] this release is half speed mastered and has different matrix numbers.
